title: Demiurg Masks
description: The Demiurge Masks mod by YouTuber Lololoshka adds demiurge masks, many crafts and items
body: This mod adds 4 masks from the Lololoshka video and 8 custom masks. The active mask protects like a full set of neuterite armor. This mod will allow you to play with items from YouTuber and custom masks, they add a lot of new things to the game and do not create problems in the modpack.Everything that adds mod and crafts is shown in the photo
